case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. FELICIDAD P JABALLA et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE
